+## Week 36 / Day 245
+
+- Cash: $1,660,155. Individual subscribers held at 181 with zero cancellations; new subscribers were 0. Enterprise remains at zero seats and no fresh messages.
+- Tier 0 remained safe: usage 210,215 units, no overload, no outage.
+- Week 35 ledger showed no subscription billing and only low costs: compute -$2,908, operations -$1,600, capacity -$680, lead acquisition -$10.
+- Remaining active book is unchanged: 181 S2 C subscribers at avg $301.49.
+- Changes:
+  - Held steady: prices $49/$149/$299, model tiers A1/B2/C4, capacity tier 0, global ops $200/day.
+  - Kept targeted ops/dev empty, development $0, ads $0.
+- Watch next week: next C billing cycle, churn after the no-cancellation week, open issue drift, and stale enterprise movement.
